# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

This upgrade moves `ROBdk97.XmlDocToMd` from `.NET 8` to `.NET 10` using an all-at-once strategy. The project will be updated in one main upgrade task followed by validation and completion checks.

**Progress**: 2/2 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-project-upgrade: Upgrade target frameworks and dependencies for ROBdk97.XmlDocToMd
- ✅ 02-test-and-finalize: Validate upgraded solution and finalize upgrade artifacts
